purpose: Planning and contract anchor for fifth-wave swarm-scale control-plane work on 64+ core / 256GB+ RAM hosts.

atlas_contract_lane.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fifth_wave_swarm_control_plane_atlas CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test fifth_wave_swarm_control_plane_atlas_contract -- --nocapture
does_not_cover: does not prove broad workspace health
does not prove release readiness
does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not implement fifth-wave child surfaces

fourth_wave_inputs.consumed_as: operator vocabulary, rollback taxonomy, no-local-fallback policy, and no-claim boundary source
freshness policy and child-row evidence status model
resource envelope classes, remote-required command policy, and claim-boundary model
claim status vocabulary and yellow-scoped no-claim examples
Agent Mail handoff text, admission decision taxonomy, and planner receipt fixtures

child_lanes.summary: Broker fresh, remote-required proof receipts so agents can reuse valid evidence without accepting stale heads, local fallback, or zero-test exact filters.
child_lanes.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fifth_wave_rch_proof_freshness_broker CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test fifth_wave_rch_proof_freshness_broker_contract -- --nocapture
does_not_cover: does not prove release readiness
does not prove broad workspace health
does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not authorize local Cargo fallback

child_lanes.summary: Define deterministic NUMA and cache-locality lab scenarios before any production scheduler policy changes.
child_lanes.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fifth_wave_numa_scheduler_locality_lab CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test fifth_wave_numa_scheduler_locality_lab_contract -- --nocapture
does_not_cover: does not prove scheduler performance improvement
does not change production scheduling policy
does not prove no regression
does not implement the fourth-wave governor

child_lanes.summary: Add replay corpus coverage for cancellation storms, obligation pressure, loser drain, and region-close quiescence at swarm scale.
child_lanes.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fifth_wave_cancellation_storm_replay_corpus CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test fifth_wave_cancellation_storm_replay_corpus_contract -- --nocapture
does_not_cover: does not prove broad cancellation correctness
does not prove broad workspace health
does not replace DPOR or formal proofs
does not implement production admission policy

child_lanes.summary: Define explicit capacity-ticket admission receipts for agent swarms without enabling production-on-by-default throttling.
child_lanes.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fifth_wave_capacity_ticket_agent_admission CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test fifth_wave_capacity_ticket_agent_admission_contract -- --nocapture
does_not_cover: does not enable production-on-by-default admission control
does not prove runtime resource enforcement
does not prove live fleet capacity
does not implement the fourth-wave governor

child_lanes.summary: Define deterministic operator heatmap snapshots for live swarm telemetry without claiming live fleet availability or production dashboards.
child_lanes.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fifth_wave_live_swarm_telemetry_heatmap CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test fifth_wave_live_swarm_telemetry_heatmap_contract -- --nocapture
does_not_cover: does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not implement a production dashboard
does not prove broad observability correctness
does not prove broad workspace health

non_goals: does not implement the fourth-wave governor
does not close asupersync-86fe9v or asupersync-86fe9v.8
does not prove broad workspace health
does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not authorize local Cargo fallback
does not create branches, worktrees, scratch clones, or non-main refs

failure_fixtures.mutation: remove proof_command from a child lane
failure_fixtures.expected_reason: every child lane must declare a remote-required proof command

failure_fixtures.mutation: set local_fallback_allowed=true or include a local fallback marker
failure_fixtures.expected_reason: fifth-wave proof lanes must fail closed to remote RCH

failure_fixtures.mutation: remove does_not_cover rows from a child lane
failure_fixtures.expected_reason: each child lane must name explicit no-claim boundaries

failure_fixtures.mutation: add performance improvement, no-regression, broad workspace health, or release readiness to covers
failure_fixtures.expected_reason: benchmark or release claims require fresh evidence outside this atlas

failure_fixtures.mutation: replace fifth-wave child surfaces with fourth-wave governor implementation claims
failure_fixtures.expected_reason: the atlas may consume fourth-wave inputs but must not re-file or inflate fourth-wave governor claims

closeout_requirements: bv --robot-triage still identifies downstream child beads as unblocked by the atlas
br dep cycles reports no dependency cycles
working-tree commits stay on main and do not touch release-source files owned by other agents
no local Cargo fallback is used as proof
